summary: Tested new F&O contract resolution and market charts features. All 24 new backend tests passed (100%). All 22 existing API tests passed (100%). Frontend Market Analysis page shows NIFTY 50 and BANK NIFTY intraday area charts plus 8 stock sparklines. Quant Intelligence page pipeline works with F&O Contract Resolution section appearing for BUY/SELL signals.

contract_resolution: GET /api/quant/contract/NIFTY?action=BUY returns CE contract with NIFTY price ~23000+
Equity lot sizes verified: HDFCBANK(550), TCS(150), INFY(300), ICICIBANK(700), SBIN(1500)
Contract has proper expiry date format (YYYY-MM-DD)
Trading symbol format includes symbol, expiry code, strike, and option type
Capital required = premium * lot_size calculation verified
pipeline_full: GET /api/quant/pipeline-full/RELIANCE returns pipeline with contract field (null when HOLD)
market_charts: GET /api/market/chart/NIFTY returns intraday candles with OHLCV data
OHLC validation: high >= low, high >= open/close, low <= open/close
charts_summary: GET /api/market/charts-summary returns NIFTY and BANKNIFTY with points arrays
Charts summary includes current, previous, change, change_pct for indices
Stock sparklines for all 8 watchlist stocks: RELIANCE, HDFCBANK, ICICIBANK, INFY, TCS, SBIN, ITC, BAJFINANCE
regression_existing_apis: All 22 existing API tests passed (auth, data, portfolio, report, health, market, strategies, positions, trades, risk, fo, audit, config, mode)
frontend: Market Analysis page: NIFTY 50 intraday area chart visible with +% change display
Market Analysis page: BANK NIFTY intraday area chart visible
Market Analysis page: Stock Intraday Sparklines section shows 8 stocks
Market Analysis page: All stock sparklines have price and change_pct displayed
Quant Intelligence page: Pipeline Analysis section works with symbol input
Quant Intelligence page: F&O Contract Resolution section appears for BUY/SELL signals (hidden for HOLD)

critical_code_review_comments: Contract resolver correctly maps BUY->CE (bullish) and SELL->PE (bearish)
All NSE lot sizes are correctly configured in contract_resolver.py
Market chart data generates full-day data (09:15-15:30) for consistent charts regardless of current time
NIFTY price correctly retrieved from market data (~23000+) not sample prices
Pipeline returns contract=null when action is HOLD (expected behavior)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all Market Analysis and Quant Intelligence features functional)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Market/chart data is generated/simulated per PRD.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 5 added F&O contract resolution (BUY->CE, SELL->PE) and market charts. All 4 new endpoints working: /api/quant/contract/{symbol}, /api/quant/pipeline-full/{symbol}, /api/market/chart/{symbol}, /api/market/charts-summary. Contract resolution displays in Quant Intelligence page only when pipeline returns BUY or SELL action (not for HOLD). Market Analysis page now shows NIFTY/BANKNIFTY intraday area charts and 8 stock sparklines.

mocked_apis_list: Contract premium estimation is simplified (not real Black-Scholes)
/api/quant/* endpoints use generated price data for demo (deterministic per symbol per day)
